# kUSBInformationDeviceIsSuspendedBit

**Enumeration Case**

The system has suspended the hub port that the USB device attaches to.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsSuspendedBit = 5
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsSuspendedBit
